name: openclaw-agent-suite-vercel-only
description: Vercel-only React + Express + MongoDB AI agent evaluation platform for portfolio and OpenClaw-style agent review work.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev:concurrently: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.vercel:install: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
